name: Garage Door
title: AI Tools for Garage Door Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for garage door companies — capture repair calls, book installs, and follow up on quotes. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: A broken garage door is an urgent call — the customer can't get the car out. We build the tools that catch that call fast and book the install and repair work that follows.
drains: Urgent repair calls that need a fast, same-day reply
Install quotes that go quiet with no follow-up
Estimating door, opener, and spring jobs from phone descriptions
The owner handling dispatch, quoting, and field work alone

tools.title: Repair-call assistant
tools.body: Every call and form gets an instant reply, the problem scoped — broken spring, dead opener, off-track door — and a same-day window booked when it's urgent.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: It drafts estimates for repairs and new doors from your standard pricing, so the customer gets a number fast and you skip the blank page.

tools.title: Install-quote follow-up
tools.body: New-door quotes get tracked and followed up, so higher-ticket install jobs don't slip away after the first visit.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's calls in route order, parts to load, installs scheduled, and yesterday's revenue.

cases.context: A garage door company handling both repairs and installs.
cases.before: Urgent repair calls competed with install quoting for the owner's attention; some slipped.
cases.after: An assistant triages every call — urgent repairs booked same-day, install quotes logged and followed up.
cases.impact: Representative result: fewer missed repair calls and a fuller install schedule.

cases.context: A company with no follow-up on new-door quotes.
cases.before: Install quotes went out and were forgotten if the customer didn't reply.
cases.after: Every open install quote followed up automatically until the customer decides.
cases.impact: Representative result: more higher-ticket install jobs closed from the same leads.

faq.q: Can it tell an urgent repair from a routine one?
faq.a: Yes. A door that won't open with a car trapped inside gets a same-day window; routine maintenance gets booked normally. We train it on your definition of urgent.

faq.q: Does it quote new doors and repairs?
faq.a: It drafts estimates from your standard pricing for both. You review and send — the customer gets a fast number, you skip the blank page.

faq.q: Will it work with my scheduling software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of the dispatch and CRM tools you already use.
